OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO HAVE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS; DECLARATION OF JAMES MILLS (TRANSACTION ID # 100006750) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAR COURIER SERVICES, INC.

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DAN PHAM'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES, TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SET REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FIRST SET FORM INTERROGATORIES WITHOUT OBJECTION BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS DECEMBER 16, 2016. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $820 IS GRANTED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SUBMITS IN OPEN COURT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL IS ALLOWED TIME TO REVIEW THE PROPOSED ORDER AND MAKE ANY COMMENTS OR OBJECTIONS BY CLOTHES OF BUSINESS ON TUESDAY, DEC-06-2016. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Set For Trial On Sep-05-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, To Deem Matters Admitted, Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, James Mills of the law offices of James Mills (510.521.8748) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Brandon Tang of the law offices of Michael Heath (510.896.9411) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by a Judge Pro Tem. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides in open court. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DAN PHAM'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, To Deem Matters Admitted, and Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff's First Set Request for Admissions are deemed admitted. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses to Defendant's First Set Request for Production of Documents and First Set Form Interrogatories without objection by close of business December 16, 2016. Defendant's request for sanctions in the amount of $820 is GRANTED. The prevailing party submits in open court a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim. Plaintiff counsel is allowed time to review the proposed order and make any comments or objections by clothes of business on Tuesday, Dec-06-2016.

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Continued To Jan-31-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-31-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
